rationales.hook_strength: 'Your skincare makes redness worse' is a direct accusation that flips the expected angle, though it's well-trodden enough in skincare circles to lose a point.
rationales.clarity: Each slide is a single, immediately actionable idea with a clear mechanism — no fluff, no slide doing double duty.
rationales.audience_fit: Busy 25-year-olds who've over-invested in actives and drink socially will feel called out, but the gut slide may lose the less health-curious end of the audience.
rationales.novelty: Barrier damage and alcohol flushing are standard skincare-creator fare; the gut-redness tie-in is the only genuinely fresh angle here.
rationales.brand_fit: Claims are hedged ('may calm,' 'for some people'), voice is flat and direct, CTA ties sleep/food/water naturally to the app without cringe.
rationales.predicted_performance: High save potential — checklist format with a guilt-inducing hook drives bookmarks — but limited share upside given the familiar core advice.
